changelog: Polish 12.6 a11y third-pass: focus-trap helper now globally available via header.php (loaded on every page that pulls header), so any modal can call window.FocusTrap.activate/deactivate without a per-page script include. Modifier modal in js/menu-modifiers.js now activates the trap on open and deactivates on close; modal markup gets role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-labelledby. Composition modal in js/app.min.js (showCompositionModal/closeCompositionModal) wired to the same helper. Removed the now-redundant explicit focus-trap.js include from employee.php.
